_comment: Bootcamp badge definitions to MERGE into readysetcloud/rsc-core -> functions/badges/catalog.json (append to its `badges` array and bump `version`). This file is NOT read at runtime by the bootcamp; the catalog is authored in rsc-core. See ./README.md for the actions the bootcamp emits and the no-backfill note.

badges.name: Bug Hunter
badges.description: Found the fault in 10 Spot-the-bug exercises.

badges.name: From Scratch
badges.description: Assembled and passed 5 Write-it exercises against real assertions.

badges.name: Interview Ready
badges.description: Finished the 25-minute interview simulation against the clock.

badges.name: Race Condition Survivor
badges.description: Completed every exercise in a bootcamp course.

badges.name: Concurrency Master
badges.description: Earned Bug Hunter, From Scratch, Interview Ready, and completed a course.
